[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 12/14 (Tue)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Midori, 2★ Momoi 

🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Period
12/14 (Tue) After Maintenance – 12/28 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
